parameters.content:
## Fill any PDF form — no AI model needed

**Setup (2 min):**
1. Get an API key at https://justfill.app/account → API keys
2. Paste it into the **Config** node
3. Save a template for your PDF once (open it with any MCP agent — Claude, Cursor — name the fields, `save_template`). Templates: https://justfill.app/dashboard?tab=templates

**Then:** every run is deterministic — data maps to fields by name, no LLM, no per-run review.

Swap the Form Trigger for Gmail/Drive/Webhook in production.

parameters.formDescription: Upload a PDF that has a saved JustFill template and provide the values as JSON.
